case_title: XUE BIN VS. LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-20-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHRISTOPHER VERKE, ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIN, XUE AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF XUE BIN, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPERTER AIDONG NI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTOPHER VERKE, ASSISTANT STORE MANGER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIN, XUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
